_description: Diff-aware indexing benchmark (Phase 10). Each case is a (commit_A, commit_B) pair on a public Python library. Engines are evaluated on whether they index commit_B's state correctly: stale_query asks about a symbol deleted between A and B (engine should NOT return it), fresh_query asks about a symbol added between A and B (engine SHOULD return it), stable_query asks about an unchanged symbol (engine SHOULD return it). Symbols and commits are taken from real commit history so reviewers can verify by reading the diffs.
_scoring: Per-case correctness = mean of [stale_miss=1-stale_hit, fresh_hit, stable_hit]. Engine aggregate = mean per-case correctness. Three diagnostic rates are also reported: staleness rate (lower better), freshness rate, stability rate.
_methodology_note: Cases are written so the symbols are unambiguous identifiers — function or class names that exist on exactly one side of the diff. The fresh + stale symbols are real, taken from the linked commits. Engines that only see commit_A will fail freshness; engines that only see commit_B will pass stale checks; engines that re-index correctly pass all three.

test_cases.description: fastapi 0.111 added the WebSocketRoute class and the websocket_route decorator on APIRouter — engines indexed pre-0.111 won't surface them.
test_cases.stale_query: fastapi internal class WebSocketCloseCode constants used pre-0.110
test_cases.fresh_query: fastapi WebSocketRoute class signature and parameters
test_cases.stable_query: fastapi APIRouter how to register routes

test_cases.description: Pydantic v1 → v2 deprecations removed `Config` inner-class shim from fastapi.params after 0.105.
test_cases.stale_query: fastapi.params Config inner class for ParamType configuration
test_cases.fresh_query: fastapi model_config ConfigDict in Pydantic v2
test_cases.stable_query: fastapi Depends function for dependency injection

test_cases.description: httpx 0.27 renamed `proxies` kwarg to `proxy` on Client/AsyncClient.
test_cases.stale_query: httpx Client constructor with proxies dict keyword argument
test_cases.fresh_query: httpx Client proxy parameter for HTTP/SOCKS proxying

test_cases.description: httpx 0.27 added the `HTTPTransport` retries argument and a new `transport.AsyncHTTPTransport` class with HTTP/2 toggle.
test_cases.stale_query: httpx pre-0.27 connection pool internals using ConnectionPool class
test_cases.fresh_query: httpx HTTPTransport retries parameter and exponential backoff
test_cases.stable_query: httpx response.json() how does decoding work

test_cases.description: Pydantic v2: BaseModel `dict()` removed in favour of `model_dump()`, `parse_obj` -> `model_validate`.
test_cases.stale_query: pydantic BaseModel dict method to serialize to plain Python dict
test_cases.stable_query: pydantic BaseModel field validation with Field

test_cases.description: Pydantic v2 removed @validator (replaced by @field_validator) and @root_validator (replaced by @model_validator).
test_cases.stale_query: pydantic validator decorator for custom field validation
test_cases.fresh_query: pydantic field_validator decorator usage in v2
test_cases.stable_query: pydantic ValidationError how to catch and inspect

test_cases.description: SQLAlchemy 2.0: `declarative_base()` superseded by `DeclarativeBase` class, `Query` superseded by `select()`.
test_cases.stale_query: sqlalchemy declarative_base function to make Base class
test_cases.fresh_query: sqlalchemy 2.0 DeclarativeBase class with type-annotated columns

test_cases.description: SQLAlchemy 2.0 added `Mapped[T]` for type-hinted columns and the `mapped_column()` helper.
test_cases.stale_query: sqlalchemy 1.x Column type annotation patterns without typing
test_cases.fresh_query: sqlalchemy 2.0 Mapped and mapped_column for typed ORM columns
test_cases.stable_query: sqlalchemy relationship() how to define one-to-many

test_cases.description: polars 1.x renamed `with_row_count` to `with_row_index` and removed several alias columns/functions.
test_cases.stale_query: polars with_row_count to add a row number column to a DataFrame
test_cases.fresh_query: polars with_row_index for adding monotonic row indices

test_cases.description: polars 1.x added the `business_day_count` expression for business-day arithmetic.
test_cases.stale_query: polars custom date arithmetic for business-day differences in 0.x
test_cases.fresh_query: polars business_day_count expression to count business days
test_cases.stable_query: polars LazyFrame collect operation for execution

test_cases.description: Litestar 2.7 added the `RateLimitMiddleware` plugin with sliding-window support.
test_cases.stale_query: litestar 2.0 pattern for building custom rate-limit middleware from scratch

test_cases.description: Litestar renamed the `dependencies` keyword on Router from `Mapping[str, Provide]` to `dict[str, Provide]` and removed the old Provide signature shim.
test_cases.stale_query: litestar Provide constructor with sync_to_thread legacy keyword
test_cases.fresh_query: litestar Provide modern signature with use_cache and sync_to_thread keyword
test_cases.stable_query: litestar Controller base class for grouping routes

test_cases.description: msgspec 0.18 added the `Meta` annotation for field-level validation (min_length, ge/le, pattern).
test_cases.stale_query: msgspec how to validate field constraints with custom __post_init__
test_cases.fresh_query: msgspec Meta annotation for min_length max_length pattern validation
test_cases.stable_query: msgspec Struct class for typed schema definition

test_cases.description: msgspec 0.18 renamed the `unset` sentinel to `UNSET` (uppercase) for default field values.
test_cases.stale_query: msgspec unset sentinel value as default for optional Struct fields
test_cases.fresh_query: msgspec UNSET sentinel for Struct field absence in v0.18
test_cases.stable_query: msgspec json encoder and decoder usage

test_cases.description: requests 2.32 changed default cookie persistence behaviour on Session by adding a stricter check in resolve_redirects.
test_cases.stale_query: requests Session.resolve_redirects pre-2.32 cookie merge behaviour
